steps.title: Run the proportional table check
steps.content: Because the ratio $\frac{y}{x}$ is constant, the relationship has the form $y=kx$. Enter the known rows $(1,4)$, $(3,12)$, and $(5,20)$ in Desmos and run $y_1\sim k x_1$.

steps.title: Use the constant of proportionality
steps.content: Desmos returns $k=4$, so the rule is $y=4x$. The same result is visible mentally from the first row: $4/1=4$.

steps.title: Find the missing table value
steps.content: When $x=40$, $y=4(40)=160$. Therefore the missing value is $160$, which matches choice D.
